final_prompt.prompt:
Create a single-panel educational knowledge card for children explaining the story of the Battle of Red Cliffs (赤壁之战) from the Three Kingdoms era, with a clear title, bullet-point key facts, and cartoon storybook illustration.

Style/medium: children's educational knowledge card with the gentle watercolor warmth of a storybook, designed for young readers
Composition: single large card layout with prominent title at top, illustrated story scene occupying the central visual space, key facts listed in clean bullet points along the side
Subject: the Battle of Red Cliffs — 赤壁之战 story depicted in cartoon illustration: Zhou Yu and Zhuge Liang's fire attack strategy, the burning chain-linked Cao Cao's fleet on the Yangtze River
Scene/backdrop: the Yangtze River at dusk with flames rising from the chained warships, dramatic sky reflecting the fire
Lighting/mood: the warm amber glow of strategic fire meeting cool river dusk, a story told with wonder rather than violence
Color palette: warm storybook amber and flame orange in conversation with cool river blues and evening purples, the trust between young reader and history
Materials/textures: soft watercolor paper with gentle pigment bleeding, the matte kindness of children's book illustration
Text (verbatim): 赤壁之战 (Battle of Red Cliffs)
Constraints: single knowledge card format, title clearly visible, bullet-point key facts positioned alongside illustration, child-appropriate visual treatment of battle scene
Avoid: graphic violence, dense text blocks, adult war documentary aesthetic, cluttered layout, scary imagery for young children
